name: RABBIT-CAGE-10
title: @-imported policy files in CLAUDE.md are not expanded into session context at startup
description: CLAUDE.md lists four @-import directives (@./.claude/policy/philosophy.md, spec-rules.md, coding-rules.md, workflow-rules.md). Claude Code does not expand these at session startup — the system-reminder only injects the raw CLAUDE.md text with literal @./path references. The policy file contents are never loaded. As a result, Claude must manually Read each policy file to answer workflow questions; the intended 'internalized at startup' behavior is absent. Per spec invariant 11, CLAUDE.md must contain @-imports sourcing files from .claude/policy/ — the implicit contract is that this mechanism loads the files into context. Actual: @-imports appear as inert text; policy is not in context without manual intervention. Expected: philosophy, spec-rules, coding-rules, and workflow-rules are in context from first token of every session.

history.note: [skip-vet: vet-triage.json written by main session; fix verified: rbt-session-init.sh deployed, wired, test-green]
